name: Vaca Valley Country Club
about: Vaca Valley Country Club is a premium private club that merges the timeless tradition of golf with state-of-art innovation. The venue offers a luxurious social environment and exclusive access to cutting-edge Trackman simulator technology, providing a private community for golfers to practice, compete, and connect year-round. Designed to meet the needs of the modern golfer, the facility features a collection of historic memorabilia and photographs, creating an atmosphere rich with story and elegance while being a tribute to the game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to four premium Trackman simulators for unparalleled accuracy and data insights
A private, members-only social club environment for networking and connection
Flexible membership options (individual, corporate, family) to suit various needs
Advanced coaching and personalized simulator sessions to enhance gameplay

food_and_drink.notes: Partners with local companies to provide premium food options
Full bar service with premium beverage options

simulator_hardware.notes: Four Trackman simulators with dual-radar technology for accurate trajectory and spin tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are highly encouraged to bring your own clubs for the most accurate and consistent data from the Trackman simulators. Premium rental sets are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue partners with local companies to provide premium food and beverage options. Outside food and drink policies are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but the simulators offer both serious practice and realistic course play experiences.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is a private, members-only social club focused on golf and professional networking. It does not promote itself as kid-friendly.
